vocab.example: I view photography as a form of visual storytelling, where each frame conveys a narrative about the human condition.

vocab.meaning: những bức ảnh chụp tự nhiên (không diễn)
vocab.example: I have a knack for capturing candid shots of my friends when they are completely unaware of the camera.
I like to add an artistic flair to my travel photos by experimenting with unconventional angles and lighting.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh tĩnh lặng, thanh bình
vocab.example: Whenever I travel to the countryside, I focus on capturing serene landscapes to evoke a sense of peace.

vocab.meaning: bố cục/đưa chủ thể vào khung hình
vocab.example: I often use overhanging branches or archways to frame the subject and draw the viewer's eye into the center.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/hiệu ứng của ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: Black and white photography is perfect for highlighting the dramatic play of light and shadow on architectural surfaces.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh giàu sức gợi (cảm xúc/kỷ niệm)
vocab.example: My goal is to produce evocative imagery that resonates with people on an emotional level.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: I spend a considerable amount of time on post-processing to enhance the colors and contrast of my raw files.
Adjusting the shutter speed allows me to either freeze a fast-moving athlete or blur a flowing waterfall.
I am very meticulous about the visual aesthetics of my photos, ensuring every element is perfectly balanced.
